description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The element "proportional linear scale" describes a method where the budget reduction is directly proportional to the decline in voting
activity between 95% and 75%. Here, the pertinent range of voting

activity spans from 95% to 75%, which is 20 percentage points. The budget decreases linearly across these 20 percentage points. In other words, the RD budget decreases by **5%** for every percentage point drop in voting
activity from 95% to 75% (since 100% divided by 20 percentage points = 5% per point).

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
